2327740.name: Bird Watch: Central Park
2327740.description: Bird Watch Central Park is an Ornithology Simulator where you traverse New York City’s central park in search of various bird species to fill your log. Take in the breathtaking scenery of a to-scale Central Park and keep your eyes peeled for various bird species as you fully immerse yourself in Bird Watching. Take out your camera and grab some cool pictures of the various birds walking around or casual walk in the simulated Central Park and enjoy the view while listening to our realistic bird sounds!
2327740.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
